Errea is the kit manufacturer from 1997 onward, across segments 1997–1999, 1999–2004, 2004–2008, 2008–, 2009–2011, 2011–2013, and 2013–. Merging overlaps, this forms a continuous span from 1997 through at least 2013. Counting closed years up to 2013 gives 2013 − 1997 = 16 years.
